product_name: Clinical AI Safety Ops / Health AI Assurance Kit
purpose: Give a single local entry point for the P0 through P7 Health AI Assurance Kit artifacts before any external proof route.

quick_start_order.action: Open this Start Here file first.
quick_start_order.why: It maps every local proof artifact and repeats the blocked gates.

quick_start_order.action: Read the Health AI Assurance Kit roadmap.
quick_start_order.why: It shows the lane structure, the opened P8 issue, and the follow up review gates.

quick_start_order.action: Read the kit level assurance card.
quick_start_order.why: It is the single evidence layer summary.

quick_start_order.action: Use SafetyGuard Studio only as a local synthetic or manual answer surface.
quick_start_order.why: It gives a practical product view without provider calls.

quick_start_order.action: Use SourceCheckup Medical for internal source support review.
quick_start_order.why: It keeps source presence separate from exact claim support.

quick_start_order.action: Check the Turkish drift dashboard before language claims.
Use the clinician literacy demo index for local education flow only.
quick_start_order.why: It keeps medical advice and institution claims blocked.

quick_start_order.action: Use issue 231 as the first public proof route and stop before any further external action.
quick_start_order.why: Any follow up email, post, PR, provider run, clinical panel work, or institution named route still needs separate review.

proof_pack_artifacts.label: Roadmap
proof_pack_artifacts.what_it_shows: Shows the full Clinical AI Safety Ops build direction and completed phases.
proof_pack_artifacts.does_not_show: Does not allow external release or institution named claims.

proof_pack_artifacts.label: Kit level assurance card
proof_pack_artifacts.what_it_shows: Connects eight local evidence layers into one internal card.
proof_pack_artifacts.does_not_show: Does not claim clinical validation, source truth certification, model ranking, or regulatory compliance.

proof_pack_artifacts.label: SafetyGuard Studio product mode
proof_pack_artifacts.what_it_shows: Local product surface with 5 features and 4 endpoints.
proof_pack_artifacts.does_not_show: Does not call provider APIs or make deployment claims.

proof_pack_artifacts.label: SourceCheckup Medical CLI report
proof_pack_artifacts.what_it_shows: Runnable source support report with schema sourcecheckup_medical_report_v0_2.
proof_pack_artifacts.does_not_show: Does not certify exact claim support without separate review.

proof_pack_artifacts.label: Turkish drift preview dashboard
proof_pack_artifacts.what_it_shows: Tracks 5 TR EN pairs and 44 existing Turkish synthetic rows.
proof_pack_artifacts.does_not_show: Does not merge validation tiers or create new case claims.

proof_pack_artifacts.label: Clinician literacy demo index
proof_pack_artifacts.what_it_shows: Local 20 minute demo with 3 synthetic cases.
proof_pack_artifacts.does_not_show: Does not select physicians, give medical advice, or claim institution support.

proof_pack_artifacts.label: Monitoring digest schema
proof_pack_artifacts.what_it_shows: Manual monitoring schema with 7 watch surfaces and 6 sample rows.
proof_pack_artifacts.does_not_show: Does not start automation or paid runs.

proof_pack_artifacts.label: Local leaderboard draft preview
proof_pack_artifacts.what_it_shows: Local preview closes 27 public rows from existing artifacts.
proof_pack_artifacts.does_not_show: Does not modify the public leaderboard or rank models as winners.

proof_pack_artifacts.label: Adapter framework smoke
proof_pack_artifacts.does_not_show: Does not claim registry acceptance or upstream compatibility.

next_safe_internal_action: Prepare separate reviewed routes for any follow up PR, provider run, panel work, or institution named action.
